occupation: Chief Executive Officer at BNR Communications

experiences.title: Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description:
. LabOut, an independent consultancy agency set up by Jim, believes the great potential of
 reaching consumers in their moving world, meaning their everyday's travelling outside of their
 home. LabOut, Lab for Out-Of-Home , is aiming to support the brands, the media, the agencies to
 create experiences/communication in the real world.
. Specialized in out-of-home, mobile and all possible off-line marketing tools, which contact
 consumers face-to-face. 
. Services offered from improving buying efficiency to launching integrated O2O media/
communication planning for brands/agencies/media, to re-position of media, set-up of trading
 platform, development of e-strategy, even the corporate’s architecture of communication offers. 
 Starting from April 2015, LabOut provides VC/funds to connect & evaluate OOH media M&A.

experiences.title: Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description:
A first local region CEO role to explore the potential and skills to work on China brands. Coordinate
 all GroupM units in Guangzhou to develop a sustainable business model in 8 provinces in South
 China and potentially a great learning for China business development. Lead 4 GroupM agencies
 (MindShare, Maxus, MEC, MediaCom) in business development and investment. Manage
 GroupM functions (trading, finance, HR & administration)

experiences.title: Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description:
Worked with GroupM agencies to build the Kinetic China to provide integrated OOH offers to clients
 from planning, buying and execution. In charge of the whole china operation, including 3 offices
 in Shanghai, Beijing and Guangzhou, with 115 staff. Grow the company 350% in media spending
 within 6 years and become the leading outdoor media agency in China. Develop new services/
revenue beyond traditional media buying by introducing activation campaigns, media consultancy,
 subscription of corporate publications, and event sponsorship, etc. Create the first-ever out-ofhome communication exhibition in 2008 and is recognized as the sharing platform of new concept,
 new media, technology, and campaign ideas for the industry in China.

experiences.title: VP Sales & Marketing
experiences.description:
Silicon Valley based Internet Technology company with key investors from Taiwan. Identify
 business opportunities in the field of one-to-one communication over Internet. Establish and lead
 Marketing & Sales team in Taiwan. Develop and execute the pricing structure and proposals.

experiences.title: VP of Marketing
experiences.description: Subsidiary of Sony Entertainment Television in Taiwan.   Aiming to introduce the brand and to build  foot print to Chinese cable TV views cross the 3 markets of the Greater China.

experiences.title: Group Account Director
experiences.description: To provide the clients a full-integrated marketing communication services cross advertising, direct marketing, database  management, PR & events.

experiences.title: Senior Sales Manager
experiences.description: Starting from the receptionist role of Front Desk, one of fast promotion to Sales & Marketing Department.  Grown the Hyatt's exclusive travel planner loyalty program, Private Line, to connect  with the most powerful hotel decision makers in Taiwan.
